title: Pan-Seared Pak Choi with Jamaican Spice Crust
description: A flavorful and nutritious stir-fry dish featuring pak choi and a crunchy Jamaican spice crust. This recipe is perfect for a quick dinner or lunch option.

ingredients.name: Pak Choi
ingredients.notes: Separate the leaves from the stems

ingredients.name: Intense
ingredients.notes: Intense is a type of oil or sauce, assuming it's a neutral flavor, but adjust to taste

ingredients.name: Miso
ingredients.notes: White or yellow miso works best for this recipe

ingredients.name: Skillet
ingredients.notes: Assuming you're using a skillet as a utensil for this recipe, not as an ingredient

instructions: Heat the skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the intense oil to the skillet and swirl to coat.
Sprinkle the Jamaican spice mix over the pak choi and toss to coat.
Add the pak choi to the skillet and stir-fry until slightly tender.
Add the miso and stir-fry for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
